news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gains USFDA approval for Ivermectin 3 mg and Dapsone tablets.
Ivermectin has $14.8M annual US sales; Dapsone records $8.4M sales.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gains USFDA approval for Ivermectin 3 mg and Dapsone tablets.
Ivermectin has $14.8M annual US sales; Dapsone records $8.4M sales.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences develops Pembrolizumab biosimilar FYB206 showing bioequivalence to Keytruda.
The company plans to file for approval with the USFDA based on positive data.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences develops Pembrolizumab biosimilar FYB206 showing bioequivalence to Keytruda.
The company plans to file for approval with the USFDA based on positive data.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences to launch generic semaglutide injection post Ozempic patent expiry, approved by DCGI.
Stock rose 1.7% intraday; up 4% in 5 days, 5.7% YoY. USFDA approved Bosentan tablets/suspension.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences to launch generic semaglutide injection post Ozempic patent expiry, approved by DCGI.
Stock rose 1.7% intraday; up 4% in 5 days, 5.7% YoY. USFDA approved Bosentan tablets/suspension.

news.title:
Zydus plans Day 1 launch of Semaglutide injection post-patent expiry in India.
Drug for Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity features reusable pen for better adherence.
news.summary:
Zydus plans Day 1 launch of Semaglutide injection post-patent expiry in India.
Drug for Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity features reusable pen for better adherence.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad unit cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, boosting regulatory credibility.
Zydus also gained USFDA approval for bosentan tablets and launched ANYRA for eye care; shares down 1.5% YTD at ₹901.35.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad unit cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, boosting regulatory credibility.
Zydus also gained USFDA approval for bosentan tablets and launched ANYRA for eye care; shares down 1.5% YTD at ₹901.35.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad injectable facility cleared by USFDA inspection.
No issues were reported by USFDA during the inspection.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad injectable facility cleared by USFDA inspection.
No issues were reported by USFDA during the inspection.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences launches India's first Aflibercept 2mg Anyra™ biosimilar for diabetic retinopathy and AMD.
Partnerships with Regeneron and Bayer aim to improve access to affordable biologics.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences launches India's first Aflibercept 2mg Anyra™ biosimilar for diabetic retinopathy and AMD.
Partnerships with Regeneron and Bayer aim to improve access to affordable biologics.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences launches its first indigenously developed biosimilar for ophthalmic care.
The 2 mg biosimilar treats visual impairment caused by various conditions.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences launches its first indigenously developed biosimilar for ophthalmic care.
The 2 mg biosimilar treats visual impairment caused by various conditions.

news.title:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
TVS Motor produces 1M vehicles in Indonesia; Jindal Saw's API license suspended post audit.
news.summary:
Zydus Life gains USFDA approval for bosentan tablets; NCC and OB Infra face NHAI debarment.
TVS Motor produces 1M vehicles in Indonesia; Jindal Saw's API license suspended post audit.

news.title:
Zydus gains USFDA approval for Bosentan 32 mg for PAH in children aged 3+.
Bosentan earns USD 9.3M annually; produced at Zydus's Ahmedabad facility.
news.summary:
Zydus gains USFDA approval for Bosentan 32 mg for PAH in children aged 3+.
Bosentan earns USD 9.3M annually; produced at Zydus's Ahmedabad facility.

news.title:
Zydus Life launched PEPAIR, India's first affordable OPEP device for COPD, asthma, priced at ₹990.
Q3FY25 net profit rose 2% YoY to ₹1,042 cr; revenue up 30.3% to ₹6,865 cr, beating estimates.
news.summary:
Zydus Life launched PEPAIR, India's first affordable OPEP device for COPD, asthma, priced at ₹990.
Q3FY25 net profit rose 2% YoY to ₹1,042 cr; revenue up 30.3% to ₹6,865 cr, beating estimates.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences secures USFDA approval for Ammonium Lactate Cream 12%, aiding dry skin treatment.
The product will be produced in Ahmedabad, sold by Viona Pharma in the US, with $15M annual sales.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences secures USFDA approval for Ammonium Lactate Cream 12%, aiding dry skin treatment.
The product will be produced in Ahmedabad, sold by Viona Pharma in the US, with $15M annual sales.

news.title:
Zydus settles patent litigation with Astellas, paying $120M.
Zydus to pay licensing fees on generic Mirabegron till Sept 2027.
news.summary:
Zydus settles patent litigation with Astellas, paying $120M.
Zydus to pay licensing fees on generic Mirabegron till Sept 2027.

news.title:
SC denies request to stop Zydus Life from selling Nivolumab biosimilar.
ER Squibb directed to map Zydus Life's product and approach HC for legal action.
news.summary:
SC denies request to stop Zydus Life from selling Nivolumab biosimilar.
ER Squibb directed to map Zydus Life's product and approach HC for legal action.

news.title:
Zydus Life plans FDA filing for Saroglitazar Magnesium, starts Phase III biosimilar trials in India.
Targets Keytruda biosimilar launch by 2028-2029 and joins first wave of GLP-1 launches in India.
news.summary:
Zydus Life plans FDA filing for Saroglitazar Magnesium, starts Phase III biosimilar trials in India.
Targets Keytruda biosimilar launch by 2028-2029 and joins first wave of GLP-1 launches in India.

news.title:
Zydus Life's CDMO business from Agenus to start sales in H2 FY27, targeting over INR 100M in 2-3 years.
Vaccines aim for INR 1,000 Cr in 3-4 years; projected costs INR 1,750-1,800 Cr with Agenus adding INR 20M annually.
news.summary:
Zydus Life's CDMO business from Agenus to start sales in H2 FY27, targeting over INR 100M in 2-3 years.
Vaccines aim for INR 1,000 Cr in 3-4 years; projected costs INR 1,750-1,800 Cr with Agenus adding INR 20M annually.

news.title:
Zydus Life expects growth in U.S. business for FY27 via new launches.
India business to grow double digits with innovative brands, GLP-1 launches.
news.summary:
Zydus Life expects growth in U.S. business for FY27 via new launches.
India business to grow double digits with innovative brands, GLP-1 launches.

news.title:
Zydus Life expects 23%+ EBITDA margin for Q4 FY26 without Revlimid.
Plans R&D spending at 7.5-8% of revenue for FY26; forecasts 20%+ growth in global formulation.
news.summary:
Zydus Life expects 23%+ EBITDA margin for Q4 FY26 without Revlimid.
Plans R&D spending at 7.5-8% of revenue for FY26; forecasts 20%+ growth in global formulation.

news.title:
Zydus Life gets SC nod to sell life-saving cancer drug, challenging BMS.
SC directs BMS to map Zydus' product against its patent for High Court action.
news.summary:
Zydus Life gets SC nod to sell life-saving cancer drug, challenging BMS.
SC directs BMS to map Zydus' product against its patent for High Court action.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences' Dec 2025 standalone net sales fell 9.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 2,283.6 cr while net profit plummeted 37% to Rs 296.5 cr.
EPS dropped to Rs 2.95 from Rs 4.68 Y-o-Y; shares closed at Rs 923.45 on Feb 6, 2026, giving 3.4% 6-month returns.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences' Dec 2025 standalone net sales fell 9.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 2,283.6 cr while net profit plummeted 37% to Rs 296.5 cr.
EPS dropped to Rs 2.95 from Rs 4.68 Y-o-Y; shares closed at Rs 923.45 on Feb 6, 2026, giving 3.4% 6-month returns.
